name: list_tasks
description: Retrieve a list of all tasks in the workspace, optionally filtered by project. Each task includes its name, status, assignee, and other metadata.

parameters.name: project
parameters.description: Project GID to filter tasks by a specific project.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of tasks to return (default: 50, max: 100).

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset for pagination to retrieve the next set of results.
